prompt: Which ACCEPTED architectural decisions have NO recorded rationale? List them all.

ground_truth.sparql: SELECT DISTINCT ?s ?title WHERE { GRAPH <https://moosedev.dev/kg/project> { ?s a ?k ; <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?title . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?k),"ArchitecturalDecision")) ?s ?sp ?st . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?sp),"hasLifecycleStatus")) FILTER(LCASE(STR(?st))="accepted") FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?s ?ep ?o . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?ep),"hasRationale")) } } } ORDER BY ?title

expected_set.title: Bridged dynamic hops in trace tools
Full Read parity for file view
JVM and CSharp const-field kind switch
Native static reads stay in family
TS imports stay in language family
